runtimeTarget.publishedPortMustMatch: numeric loopback address family and port, revalidated from post-lock immutable identity

frontendEntry.measurementIsolation: Each selected dataset mode uses a warmup token, then refreshes a measured JWT immediately before the pure DB counter snapshot and validates exp against measured duration plus an approved safety. Measured k6 setup performs no HTTP, and only dashboard summary is measured.

adoptionGate.dbWindow: strict database/table/observer-session-planner schema; required sets exact; precision-safe decimal counter deltas; stable stats_reset/analyze/autoanalyze/observer planner; boundary snapshots contain no external activity
adoptionGate.externalActivityAdoption: non-adoptable until user-approved continuous provenance or isolation exists

correctness: UNPAID PENALTY/COFFEE amount and member totals
OPEN and recently CLOSED poll counts
per-OPEN-poll response counts and aggregate missing count
same-campus data only and other-campus denial
evidence: pure pre/post pg_stat_database and pg_stat_user_tables counter snapshots with observer-overhead interpretation metadata
machine-readable DB correctness with exact per-OPEN-poll response counts
observer psql session planner settings and context (not measured app-session planner proof)
operator external activity declaration and boundary-only pg_stat_activity snapshots (not complete provenance)
matching actual Compose project/service labels and a shared Compose-project runner lock
initial/mode-before/mode-after immutable container and PostgreSQL postmaster continuity evidence
